name: Jax - dry hump (UPDATED)
description:
Thanks to the new episode I have decided to revisit this and add some stuff.

I added two new opening messages, one masculine coded and one feminine coded. The original opening is still there and has remained neutral with a lot of freedom still.

Enjoy!

As the digital circus (and Caine) doesn't allow sex, Jax has to find a way to satisfy those needs without any genitalia. He's found that even just rubbing against things can sometimes help. But after finding out it feels even better against someone else, he asks for your help with it.

The ai has a hard time understanding that genitals don't really exist in the circus, you do have to remind it of that sometimes. But regardless, have fun!
creator: Zipes
